media.title: Nikola Vucevic returning to Magic in free agency as Moe Wagner departs Orlando
media.description: Free agent Nikola Vucevic has agreed on a one-year, $3.9 million deal to return to the Magic, ESPN first reported Wednesday morning.

items.title: Jevon Carter is getting a one-year deal for the veteran minimum. He'll hit the cap at roughly $2.4M. Same cap hit as Nikola Vucevic.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Jevon Carter is getting a one-year deal for the veteran minimum. He'll hit the cap at roughly $2.4M. Same cap hit as Nikola Vucevic.

I've got the Magic about $6.2M under the second apron with two open roster spots. Could squeeze in a Taxpayer MLE signing, but likely won't to avoid a 2A hard cap.

items.title: As Nikola Vucevic returns to the #Magic, Moe Wagner expectedly departs Orlando in free agency:
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt: As Nikola Vucevic returns to the #Magic, Moe Wagner expectedly departs Orlando in free agency:

items.title: Nikola Vucevic is returning to the Orlando Magic, per Shams.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Nikola Vucevic is returning to the Orlando Magic, per Shams.

Vuc was a consummate pro in Boston. It just didn’t work out. Fracturing his ring finger had a lot to do with that.

Cool seeing him go back to Orlando, where his career took off and he became an All-Star.

items.title: Orlando Magic salary cap situation after signing Nikola Vucevic.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Orlando Magic salary cap situation after signing Nikola Vucevic.

He'll earn $3.9 million but count as $2.4 million on their cap sheet.

This likely means Moe Wagner won't return.

They can fill their remaining roster spots with minimums and remain under the second apron.
